market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +0.46%, Nasdaq +0.68%, Dow +0.04%. Technology led sectors (+2.80%) while Utilities lagged (-1.64%). Claude Sonnet 4.6 led the day at +0.01%. 3 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +8.66%. Key headline: Why inflation is the economic problem of the decade - Axios — market reaction muted.
